# /worktree

## Purpose
Create or inspect an issue worktree and verify scope-lock and overlap safety.

## When To Use
Before parallel implementation starts for an issue-scoped branch.

## Required Contracts
- `scope-lock` - Scope identity (issue/branch/pr head/range) must match before high-impact operations
- `overlap-safety` - Parallel issues must have no overlapping change targets or be serialized

## Next Commands
- `/estimation`

## Source Of Truth
- `framework/scripts/manifest.yaml`
- `framework/docs/contract/workflow-map.md`
